title: limnochloa baeothryon var. minor
intro: Limnochloa baeothryon var. minor, also known as Lesser Swamp-lovegrass, is a species of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of Limnochloa baeothryon var. minor include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to make remedies for various ailments.
